title: Senior Fleet Manager at Red Express

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Red Express
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Red Express! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Red Express:
Red Express is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Red Express!
